{{Infobox character
| name = Karls Dunwood
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Karls Dunwood]] is a host with a blunt silver hook replacing his right hand.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood is a person who possesses a pen.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood's full name is [[Karls Dunwood]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Mister Dunwood has had a penalty extracted from him by [[Watch-leader Fitch]] before.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
